Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to construct an accepting Petri net for the described insurance claim process The process has activities CR DV FC CA AP P N CL There are loops after DV if documents incomplete go to RDS re document submission and then back to DV Similarly after FC if doubts go to II In depth Investigation which can happen multiple times before proceeding to CA

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The description says if documents are incomplete after Document Verification DV a re submission of documents step occurs Re Document Submission RDS before the process continues So after DV a decision either continue to FC or go to RDS After RDS presumably go back to DV to verify again Typically after re submission you need re verification So loop DV to RDS to DV

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Similarly after FC if doubts go to II then back to FC So we have two loops

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After CA there is a threshold if amount surpasses threshold need Approval AP then Payment P Otherwise perhaps directly to Payment The description says Approval AP The claim must be approved by a senior manager if the amount surpasses a certain threshold So if not no approval needed

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need to model that decision after CA either go to AP if threshold or go directly to P

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: In Petri nets we can model a choice place after CA two transitions one labeled AP if threshold and one labeled maybe Direct Payment But the activity names given are only CR DV FC CA AP P N CL Possibly we can model the decision as a silent transition tau

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The problem says transitions labeled with the activity names It does not say all transitions must be labeled we can have invisible transitions for routing

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can have after CA a place p after CA Then two transitions one is AP with label AP leading to a place before P and the other is a silent transition tau leading to the same place before P Then from that place transition P leads onward That models either AP or direct to P

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the DV loop we need a place after DV From that place two outgoing transitions one is RDS the other is FC RDS goes to a place before DV which is also the output of CR So if we have a place before DV that has an incoming arc from CR and from RDS then DV can fire again

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: For the FC loop if FC directly used the same input place as the main path then looping back would incorrectly allow returning to DV So we need a separate structure

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Better use a place as the input to FC that collects tokens from both main path and loop That means we need a silent transition from after DV to before FC Then FC takes token from before FC and outputs to after FC Then II can put the token back to before FC so FC can fire again

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This works Similarly for the DV loop after DV we have after DV We want to either go to FC via silent transition to before FC or go to RDS RDS should output to the place that is input to DV The input place for DV is after CR

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now we need to create places start after CR after DV before FC after FC after CA before P after P after N after CL

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We also create transitions CR DV RDS FC II CA AP P N CL and silent transitions tau1 and tau2

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now arcs CR input start output after CR DV input after CR output after DV From after DV two outgoing transitions tau1 and RDS tau1 output to before FC RDS output to after CR FC input before FC output after FC From after FC two outgoing transitions CA and II CA output to after CA II output to before FC From after CA two outgoing transitions AP and tau2 AP output to before P tau2 output to before P P input before P output after P N input after P output after N CL input after N output after CL

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Initial marking should have a token in start Final marking should have a token in after CL Also the loops are optional so the process can eventually reach the final marking
